title: Bond It Multi Purpose Powder Filler - 450g
features: Bond It Multi Purpose Powder Filler - 450g
description: A specially formulated fine powder filler for repairing internal plaster, plasterboard, wood, brick, stone and most other common building materials.br />It is perfect for preparing surfaces prior to painting and wallpapering as it provides a smooth surface once dried.br />Non shrinking making it ideal for filling cracks and holes in walls, ceilings and around door frames or skirting boards.br />Has excellent adhesion properties which stops the filler from slumping.br />Can be sanded once dry to give a smooth surface area which will hold nails and screws once fully cured.br />The filler will dry to a white finish and can be overpainted or papered without priming.br />Suitable for interior use only./p>
